title: pinus balsamea var. fraseri
intro: Pinus balsamea var. fraseri, also known as Red Spruce, is a coniferous evergreen tree native to eastern North America, characterized by its reddish-brown bark and sharp, pointed needles. The medicinal properties of Pinus balsamea var. fraseri include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic due to the presence of terpenes and other compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its role in supporting immune function and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of Pinus balsamea var. fraseri include teas, essential oils, and resin extracts, which can be used to make salves, tinctures, and other medicinal products.
